title: Dealer
description:
Job Responsibilities

  • Support the company’s proprietary trading activities using its own capital, primarily in exchange-traded futures and futures-related derivatives;

  • Perform execution and dealing activities, including order execution, trade booking, position monitoring and daily P&L tracking, under approved strategies and instructions;

  • Participate in OTC derivatives–related activities, including execution support, pricing assistance and trade lifecycle management;

  • Execute trades in accordance with established trading strategies, risk limits and internal procedures, without a requirement to independently originate aggressive trading strategies;

  • Monitor market movements and key risk indicators to support proprietary trading and risk management activities;

  • Ensure all proprietary and OTC transactions are accurately recorded, reconciled and reported in compliance with internal policies and regulatory requirements;

  • Coordinate with internal teams such as risk management, operations and compliance to ensure smooth and controlled dealing operations;

  • Perform other proprietary trading–related or internal support duties as assigned.

Job Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree or above in Finance, Economics, Mathematics, Engineering or related disciplines;

  • Minimum 3 years of relevant working experience in OTC derivatives, including execution, dealing, pricing support or trade lifecycle management;

  • Experience in futures execution, dealing or futures-related trading roles is preferred;

  • Exposure to a broad range of futures products will be an advantage;

  • Good understanding of derivatives markets and basic risk management principles;

  • Strong discipline, execution capability and compliance awareness;

  • Able to work effectively in a structured, process-driven and controlled trading environment;

  • Proficient in English and Mandarin Chinese, as the role involves communication with Chinese stakeholders and internal teams;

  • Understanding of the China futures and derivatives markets will be a strong advantage.

Preferred Qualifications (Optional)

  • Experience in futures companies, securities firms, banks or financial institutions, particularly within Chinese or international financial groups;

  • Professional certifications such as CFA or FRM are a plus but not mandatory.

Additional Information

  • This role operates under the company’s proprietary trading framework, with a focus on execution, dealing and OTC derivatives support, rather than aggressive or high-risk trading strategies;

  • Trading authority, product scope and level of discretion will be determined based on the candidate’s experience and internal arrangements;

  • The position is based in Singapore and supports the proprietary trading activities of the overseas subsidiary.

postedCompany.description:
Guotai Junan Futures, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Guotai Junan Securities, is a market leader and pioneer of promoting internationalization in China’s futures market. Since the inception in 2007, it has successfully transformed from a ‘brokerage oriented’ futures company to a large ‘comprehensive financial service provider’ with diversified businesses, including futures and options brokerage, futures investment consulting, asset management, risk management and OTC derivatives execution.

Guotai Junan Futures is the No. 1 full clearing member of China Financial Futures Exchange (CFFEX), and is registered as a full member of Dalian Commodity Exchange (DCE), Shanghai Futures Exchange (SHFE), Zhengzhou Commodity Exchange (ZCE), and Shanghai International Energy Exchange (INE).

Guotai Junan Futures has maintained ‘AA Level of A Class’ by China Securities Regulatory Commission (CSRC) since 2018, and has earned many honors over the past decade such as ‘Top 10 Chinese Futures Company’, ‘Top Financial Institutions’ and ‘The Best Futures Product Innovation Award’. Guotai Junan Futures is dedicated to become a highly reliable derivatives service provider and risk management partner for clients.
postedCompany.name: GUOTAI JUNAN FUTURES (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
